axum::routing::get(get_pagination).put(update_pagination).delete(delete_pagination),\n72\t        )\n73\t}\n74\t\n75\t/// GET /indexes/:index/settings - Get all settings.\n76\tasync fn get_all_settings(\n77\t    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n78\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n79\t) -> Result<Json<Value>, ErrorResponse> {\n80\t    let topology = state.topology().await;\n81\t\n82\t    // Query first available node\n83\t    for group in topology.groups() {\n84\t        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n85\t            let request = ScatterRequest {\n86\t                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n87\t                path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/settings\", index),\n88\t                body: vec![],\n89\t                headers: vec![],\n90\t            };\n91\t\n92\t            let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n93\t\n94\t            let result = scatter\n95\t                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n96\t                .await\n97\t                .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n98\t\n99\t            if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n100\t                if resp.status == 200 {\n101\t                    let body: Value = serde_json::from_slice(&resp.body)\n102\t                        .unwrap_or_else(|_| Value::Null);\n103\t                    return Ok(Json(body));\n104\t                } else if resp.status == 404 {\n105\t                    return Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(&index));\n106\t                }\n107\t            }\n108\t        }\n109\t    }\n110\t\n111\t    Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(&index))\n112\t}\n113\t\n114\t/// Cached original value for rollback.\n115\tstruct RollbackValue {\n116\t    /// The original value to restore on rollback.\n117\t    original_value: Option<Value>,\n118\t    /// Whether the setting existed before.\n119\t    existed: bool,\n120\t}\n121\t\n122\t/// Generic handler for updating a setting with rollback.\n123\tasync fn update_setting_with_rollback(\n124\t    state: &ProxyState,\n125\t    index: &str,\n126\t    setting_path: &str,\n127\t    value: &Value,\n128\t) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n129\t    let topology = state.topology().await;\n130\t    let targets = write_targets(0, &topology);\n131\t\n132\t    if targets.is_empty() {\n133\t        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No nodes available\"));\n134\t    }\n135\t\n136\t    // Step 1: Fetch current values from all nodes for rollback\n137\t    let mut rollback_values: std::collections::HashMap<String, RollbackValue> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n138\t\n139\t    for target in &targets {\n140\t        let get_request = ScatterRequest {\n141\t            method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n142\t            path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n143\t            body: vec![],\n144\t            headers: vec![],\n145\t        };\n146\t\n147\t        let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n148\t\n149\t        match scatter.scatter(&topology, vec![target.clone()], get_request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial).await {\n150\t            Ok(resp) => {\n151\t                if let Some(r) = resp.responses.first() {\n152\t                    let original_value = if r.status == 200 {\n153\t                        Some(serde_json::from_slice(&r.body).unwrap_or(Value::Null))\n154\t                    } else {\n155\t                        None\n156\t                    };\n157\t                    rollback_values.insert(\n158\t                        target.as_str().to_string(),\n159\t                        RollbackValue {\n160\t                            original_value,\n161\t                            existed: r.status == 200,\n162\t                        },\n163\t                    );\n164\t                }\n165\t            }\n166\t            Err(_) => {\n167\t                // Node is already down, skip rollback for it\n168\t                rollback_values.insert(target.as_str().to_string(), RollbackValue {\n169\t                    original_value: None,\n170\t                    existed: false,\n171\t                });\n172\t            }\n173\t        }\n174\t    }\n175\t\n176\t    let body_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(value).unwrap_or_default();\n177\t\n178\t    let request = ScatterRequest {\n179\t        method: \"PUT\".to_string(),\n180\t        path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n181\t        body: body_bytes,\n182\t        headers: vec![],\n183\t    };\n184\t\n185\t    let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n186\t\n187\t    // Track successful nodes for rollback\n188\t    let mut successful_nodes: Vec<String> = Vec::new();\n189\t    let mut last_response: Option<Value> = None;\n190\t\n191\t    // Sequential broadcast with rollback on failure\n192\t    for target in &targets {\n193\t        let result = scatter\n194\t            .scatter(&topology, vec![target.clone()], request.clone(), UnavailableShardPolicy::Error)\n195\t            .await;\n196\t\n197\t        match result {\n198\t            Ok(resp) => {\n199\t                if let Some(r) = resp.responses.first() {\n200\t                    if (200..300).contains(&r.status) {\n201\t                        successful_nodes.push(target.as_str().to_string());\n202\t                        let body: Value = serde_json::from_slice(&r.body).unwrap_or(Value::Null);\n203\t                        last_response = Some(body);\n204\t                    } else {\n205\t                        // Rollback from successful nodes\n206\t                        rollback_setting(state, &topology, &successful_nodes, &rollback_values, index, setting_path).await;\n207\t                        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(format!(\n208\t                            \"Failed to update setting on node {}: status {}\",\n209\t                            target.as_str(),\n210\t                            r.status\n211\t                        )));\n212\t                    }\n213\t                }\n214\t            }\n215\t            Err(e) => {\n216\t                // Rollback from successful nodes\n217\t                rollback_setting(state, &topology, &successful_nodes, &rollback_values, index, setting_path).await;\n218\t                return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(format!(\n219\t                    \"Failed to update setting on node {}: {}\",\n220\t                    target.as_str(),\n221\t                    e\n222\t                )));\n223\t            }\n224\t        }\n225\t    }\n226\t\n227\t    let response_body = if let Some(body) = last_response {\n228\t        body\n229\t    } else {\n230\t        let task_uid = state.task_manager.next_uid();\n231\t        serde_json::json!({\n232\t            \"taskUid\": task_uid,\n233\t            \"indexUid\": index,\n234\t            \"status\": \"enqueued\",\n235\t            \"type\": \"settingsUpdate\",\n236\t            \"enqueuedAt\": chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(),\n237\t        })\n238\t    };\n239\t\n240\t    Ok((axum::http::StatusCode::ACCEPTED, Json(response_body)).into_response())\n241\t}\n242\t\n243\t/// Rollback a setting from nodes that were successfully updated.\n244\tasync fn rollback_setting(\n245\t    state: &ProxyState,\n246\t    topology: &miroir_core::topology::Topology,\n247\t    successful_nodes: &[String],\n248\t    rollback_values: &std::collections::HashMap<String, RollbackValue>,\n249\t    index: &str,\n250\t    setting_path: &str,\n251\t) {\n252\t    for node_id in successful_nodes {\n253\t        if let Some(rollback) = rollback_values.get(node_id) {\n254\t            let node_id_ref = miroir_core::topology::NodeId::new(node_id.clone());\n255\t            if rollback.existed {\n256\t                // Restore original value\n257\t                if let Some(original) = &rollback.original_value {\n258\t                    let body_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(original).unwrap_or_default();\n259\t                    let _ = state\n260\t                        .client\n261\t                        .send_to_node(\n262\t                            topology,\n263\t                            &node_id_ref,\n264\t                            \"PUT\",\n265\t                            &format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n266\t                            Some(&body_bytes),\n267\t                            &[],\n268\t                        )\n269\t                        .await;\n270\t                }\n271\t            } else {\n272\t                // Setting didn't exist before, delete it\n273\t                let _ = state\n274\t                    .client\n275\t                    .send_to_node(\n276\t                        topology,\n277\t                        &node_id_ref,\n278\t                        \"DELETE\",\n279\t                        &format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n280\t                        None,\n281\t                        &[],\n282\t                    )\n283\t                    .await;\n284\t            }\n285\t        }\n286\t    }\n287\t}\n288\t\n289\t/// GET /indexes/:index/settings/filterable-attributes\n290\tasync fn get_filterable_attributes(\n291\t    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n292\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n293\t) -> Result<Json<Value>, ErrorResponse> {\n294\t    get_setting(&state, &index, \"filterable-attributes\").await\n295\t}\n296\t\n297\t/// PUT /indexes/:index/settings/filterable-attributes\n298\tasync fn update_filterable_attributes(\n299\t    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n300\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n301\t    body: Json<Value>,\n302\t) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n303\t    // Ensure _miroir_shard is always in filterable attributes\n304\t    let mut updated = body.0.clone();\n305\t    if let Some(arr) = updated.as_array_mut() {\n306\t        if !arr.iter().any(|v| v.as_str() == Some(\"_miroir_shard\")) {\n307\t            arr.push(serde_json::json!(\"_miroir_shard\"));\n308\t        }\n309\t    }\n310\t    update_setting_with_rollback(&state, &index, \"settings/filterable-attributes\", &updated).await\n311\t}\n312\t\n313\t/// DELETE /indexes/:index/settings/filterable-attributes\n314\tasync ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"Invalid JSON response\"))?;\n601\t                    return Ok(Json(value));\n602\t                } else if resp.status == 404 {\n603\t                    return Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(index));\n604\t                }\n605\t            }\n606\t        }\n607\t    }\n608\t\n609\t    Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(index))\n610\t}\n611\t\n612\t/// Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No nodes available\"));\n623\t    }\n624\t\n625\t    let request = ScatterRequest {\n626\t        method: \"DELETE\".to_string(),\n627\t        path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n628\t        body: vec![],\n629\t        headers: vec![],\n630\t    };\n631\t\n632\t    let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n633\t    let result = scatter\n634\t        .scatter(&topology, targets, request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n635\t        .await\n636\t        .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n637\t\n638\t    if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n639\t        let status = axum::http::StatusCode::from_u16(resp.status).unwrap_or(axum::http::StatusCode::OK);\n640\t        let value: Value = serde_json::from_slice(&resp.body)\n641\t            .unwrap_or_else(|_| Value::Null);\n642\t        return Ok((status, Json(value)).into_response());\n643\t    }\n644\t\n645\t    Ok((axum::http::StatusCode::ACCEPTED, Json(serde_json::json!({}))).into_response())\n646\t}\n647\t\n648\t#[cfg(test)]\n649\tmod tests {\n650\t\n651\t    #[test]\n652\t    fn test_filterable_attributes_injection() {\n653\t        let input Settings routes: GET, PATCH, DELETE /indexes/:index/settings\n//!\n//! Implements settings broadcast per plan §3:\n//! - Sequential apply-with-rollback on failure\n//! - Broadcast to all nodes\n//! - Rollback from successful nodes if any fail\n\nuse axum::{\n    extract::{Path, State},\n    response::{IntoResponse, Json, Response},\n};\nuse miroir_core::{\n    config::UnavailableShardPolicy,\n    router::write_targets,\n    scatter::{Scatter, ScatterRequest},\n};\nuse serde_json::Value;\n\nuse crate::{\n    error_response::ErrorResponse,\n    scatter::HttpScatter,\n    state::ProxyState,\n};\n\n/// Settings router.\npub fn router() -> axum::Router<ProxyState> {\n    axum::Router::new()\n        .route(\"/\", axum::routing::get(get_all_settings))\n        .route(\n            \"/filterable-attributes\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_filterable_attributes).put(update_filterable_attributes).delete(delete_filterable_attributes),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/searchable-attributes\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_searchable_attributes).put(update_searchable_attributes).delete(delete_searchable_attributes),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/sortable-attributes\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_sortable_attributes).put(update_sortable_attributes).delete(delete_sortable_attributes),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/displayed-attributes\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_displayed_attributes).put(update_displayed_attributes).delete(delete_displayed_attributes),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/ranking-rules\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_ranking_rules).put(update_ranking_rules).delete(delete_ranking_rules),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/stop-words\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_stop_words).put(update_stop_words).delete(delete_stop_words),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/synonyms\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_synonyms).put(update_synonyms).delete(delete_synonyms),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/distinct-attribute\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_distinct_attribute).put(update_distinct_attribute).delete(delete_distinct_attribute),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/typo-tolerance\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_typo_tolerance).put(update_typo_tolerance).delete(delete_typo_tolerance),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/faceting\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_faceting).put(update_faceting).delete(delete_faceting),\n        )\n        .route(\n            \"/pagination\",\n            axum::routing::get(get_pagination).put(update_pagination).delete(delete_pagination),\n        )\n}\n\n/// GET /indexes/:index/settings - Get all settings.\nasync fn get_all_settings(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    // Query first available node\n    for group in topology.groups() {\n        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n            let request = ScatterRequest {\n                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n                path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/settings\", index),\n                body: vec![],\n                headers: vec![],\n            };\n\n            let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n\n            let result = scatter\n                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n                .await\n                .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n            if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n                if resp.status == 200 {\n                    let body: Value = serde_json::from_slice(&resp.body)\n                        .unwrap_or_else(|_| Value::Null);\n                    return Ok(Json(body));\n                } else if resp.status == 404 {\n                    return Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(&index));\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(&index))\n}\n\n/// Cached original value for rollback.\nstruct RollbackValue {\n    /// The original value to restore on rollback.\n    original_value: Option<Value>,\n    /// Whether the setting existed before.\n    existed: bool,\n}\n\n/// Generic handler for updating a setting with rollback.\nasync fn update_setting_with_rollback(\n    state: &ProxyState,\n    index: &str,\n    setting_path: &str,\n    value: &Value,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n    let targets = write_targets(0, &topology);\n\n    if targets.is_empty() {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No nodes available\"));\n    }\n\n    // Step 1: Fetch current values from all nodes for rollback\n    let mut rollback_values: std::collections::HashMap<String, RollbackValue> = std::collections::HashMap::new();\n\n    for target in &targets {\n        let get_request = ScatterRequest {\n            method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n            path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n            body: vec![],\n            headers: vec![],\n        };\n\n        let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n\n        match scatter.scatter(&topology, vec![target.clone()], get_request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial).await {\n            Ok(resp) => {\n                if let Some(r) = resp.responses.first() {\n                    let original_value = if r.status == 200 {\n                        Some(serde_json::from_slice(&r.body).unwrap_or(Value::Null))\n                    } else {\n                        None\n                    };\n                    rollback_values.insert(\n                        target.as_str().to_string(),\n                        RollbackValue {\n                            original_value,\n                            existed: r.status == 200,\n                        },\n                    );\n                }\n            }\n            Err(_) => {\n                // Node is already down, skip rollback for it\n                rollback_values.insert(target.as_str().to_string(), RollbackValue {\n                    original_value: None,\n                    existed: false,\n                });\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    let body_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(value).unwrap_or_default();\n\n    let request = ScatterRequest {\n        method: \"PUT\".to_string(),\n        path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n        body: body_bytes,\n        headers: vec![],\n    };\n\n    let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n\n    // Track successful nodes for rollback\n    let mut successful_nodes: Vec<String> = Vec::new();\n    let mut last_response: Option<Value> = None;\n\n    // Sequential broadcast with rollback on failure\n    for target in &targets {\n        let result = scatter\n            .scatter(&topology, vec![target.clone()], request.clone(), UnavailableShardPolicy::Error)\n            .await;\n\n        match result {\n            Ok(resp) => {\n                if let Some(r) = resp.responses.first() {\n                    if (200..300).contains(&r.status) {\n                        successful_nodes.push(target.as_str().to_string());\n                        let body: Value = serde_json::from_slice(&r.body).unwrap_or(Value::Null);\n                        last_response = Some(body);\n                    } else {\n                        // Rollback from successful nodes\n                        rollback_setting(state, &topology, &successful_nodes, &rollback_values, index, setting_path).await;\n                        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(format!(\n                            \"Failed to update setting on node {}: status {}\",\n                            target.as_str(),\n                            r.status\n                        )));\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            Err(e) => {\n                // Rollback from successful nodes\n                rollback_setting(state, &topology, &successful_nodes, &rollback_values, index, setting_path).await;\n                return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(format!(\n                    \"Failed to update setting on node {}: {}\",\n                    target.as_str(),\n                    e\n                )));\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    let response_body = if let Some(body) = last_response {\n        body\n    } else {\n        let task_uid = state.task_manager.next_uid();\n        serde_json::json!({\n            \"taskUid\": task_uid,\n            \"indexUid\": index,\n            \"status\": \"enqueued\",\n            \"type\": \"settingsUpdate\",\n            \"enqueuedAt\": chrono::Utc::now().to_rfc3339(),\n        })\n    };\n\n    Ok((axum::http::StatusCode::ACCEPTED, Json(response_body)).into_response())\n}\n\n/// Rollback a setting from nodes that were successfully updated.\nasync fn rollback_setting(\n    state: &ProxyState,\n    topology: &miroir_core::topology::Topology,\n    successful_nodes: &[String],\n    rollback_values: &std::collections::HashMap<String, RollbackValue>,\n    index: &str,\n    setting_path: &str,\n) {\n    for node_id in successful_nodes {\n        if let Some(rollback) = rollback_values.get(node_id) {\n            let node_id_ref = miroir_core::topology::NodeId::new(node_id.clone());\n            if rollback.existed {\n                // Restore original value\n                if let Some(original) = &rollback.original_value {\n                    let body_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(original).unwrap_or_default();\n                    let _ = state\n                        .client\n                        .send_to_node(\n                            topology,\n                            &node_id_ref,\n                            \"PUT\",\n                            &format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n                            Some(&body_bytes),\n                            &[],\n                        )\n                        .await;\n                }\n            } else {\n                // Setting didn't exist before, delete it\n                let _ = state\n                    .client\n                    .send_to_node(\n                        topology,\n                        &node_id_ref,\n                        \"DELETE\",\n                        &format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n                        None,\n                        &[],\n                    )\n                    .await;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n/// GET /indexes/:index/settings/filterable-attributes\nasync fn get_filterable_attributes(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n) -> Result<Json<Value>, ErrorResponse> {\n    get_setting(&state, &index, \"filterable-attributes\").await\n}\n\n/// PUT /indexes/:index/settings/filterable-attributes\nasync fn update_filterable_attributes(\n    State(state): State<ProxyState>,\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n    body: Json<Value>,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    // Ensure _miroir_shard is always in filterable attributes\n    let mut updated = body.0.clone();\n    if let Some(arr) = updated.as_array_mut() {\n        if !arr.iter().any(|v| v.as_str() == Some(\"_miroir_shard\")) {\n            arr.push(serde_json::json!(\"_miroir_shard\"));\n        }\n    }\n    update_setting_with_rollback(&state, &index, \"settings/filterable-attributes\", &updated).await\n}\n\n/// DELETE /indexes/:index/settings/filterable-attributes\nasync fn -> Result<Json<Value>, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n\n    for group in topology.groups() {\n        if let Some(node_id) = group.nodes().first() {\n            let request = ScatterRequest {\n                method: \"GET\".to_string(),\n                path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n                body: vec![],\n                headers: vec![],\n            };\n\n            let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n\n            let result = scatter\n                .scatter(&topology, vec![node_id.clone()], request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n                .await\n                .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n            if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n                if resp.status == 200 {\n                    let value: Value = serde_json::from_slice(&resp.body)\n                        .map_err(|_| ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"Invalid JSON response\"))?;\n                    return Ok(Json(value));\n                } else if resp.status == 404 {\n                    return Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(index));\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Err(ErrorResponse::index_not_found(index))\n}\n\n/// Generic DELETE handler for resetting a setting to default.\nasync fn delete_setting(\n    state: &ProxyState,\n    index: &str,\n    setting_path: &str,\n) -> Result<Response, ErrorResponse> {\n    let topology = state.topology().await;\n    let targets = write_targets(0, &topology);\n\n    if targets.is_empty() {\n        return Err(ErrorResponse::internal_error(\"No nodes available\"));\n    }\n\n    let request = ScatterRequest {\n        method: \"DELETE\".to_string(),\n        path: format!(\"/indexes/{}/{}\", index, setting_path),\n        body: vec![],\n        headers: vec![],\n    };\n\n    let scatter = HttpScatter::new((*state.client).clone(), state.config.server.request_timeout_ms);\n    let result = scatter\n        .scatter(&topology, targets, request, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial)\n        .await\n        .map_err(|e| ErrorResponse::internal_error(e.to_string()))?;\n\n    if let Some(resp) = result.responses.first() {\n        let status = axum::http::StatusCode::from_u16(resp.status).unwrap_or(axum::http::StatusCode::OK);\n        let value: Value = serde_json::from_slice(&resp.body)\n            .unwrap_or_else(|_| Value::Null);\n .get(format!(\"{}{}\", self.base_url, path))\n            .send()\n            .await\n            .unwrap()\n    }\n\n    async fn post(&self, path: &str, body: serde_json::Value) -> reqwest::Response {\n        let client = reqwest::Client::new();\n        client\n            .post(format!(\"{}{}\", self.base_url, path))\n            .json(&body)\n            .send()\n            .await\n            .unwrap()\n    }\n\n    async fn delete(&self, path: &str) -> reqwest::Response {\n        let client = reqwest::Client::new();\n        client\n            .delete(format!(\"{}{}\", self.base_url, path))\n            .send()\n            .await\n            .unwrap()\n    }\n}\n\nstruct TestCluster {\n    proxy_url: String,\n    nodes: .map(|(i, port)| TestNode::new(format!(\"node-{}\", i), port))\n            .collect();\n\n        Self {\n            proxy_url: format!(\"http://127.0.0.1:{}\", proxy_port),\n            nodes,\n        }\n    }\n\n    async fn create_index(&self, uid: &str, primary_key: Option<&str>) -> reqwest::Response {\n        let client = reqwest::Client::new();\n        let mut body = serde_json::json!({ 7703]);\n\n    // Create index\n    let create_resp = cluster.create_index(\"test_index\", Some(\"id\")).await;\n    assert!(create_resp.status().is_success());\n\n    // Wait for index creation\n Orchestrator-side retry cache for idempotency (plan §4).\n//!\n//! Key: sha256(batch || target_node || idempotency_key_or_mtask)\n//!\n//! This cache prevents duplicate writes when retrying timed-out requests\n//! to nodes. It stores terminal responses (success or definitive failure)\n//! for a configurable TTL.\n\nuse sha2::{Digest, Sha256};\nuse std::collections::HashMap;\nuse std::sync::Arc;\nuse std::time::{Duration, Instant};\nuse tokio::sync::RwLock;\n\n/// Cached response from a node.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\npub struct CachedResponse {\n    /// Response body.\n    pub body: Vec<u8>,\n    /// HTTP status code.\n    pub status: u16,\n    /// When this cache entry was created.\n    pub cached_at: Instant,\n}\n\nimpl CachedResponse {\n    /// Check if this entry is still valid (not expired).\n    pub fn is_valid(&self, ttl: Duration) -> bool {\n        self.cached_at.elapsed() < ttl\n    }\n}\n\n/// Retry cache for idempotency.\n#[derive(Clone)]\npub struct RetryCache {\n    entries: Arc<RwLock<HashMap<String, CachedResponse>>>,\n    default_ttl: Duration,\n}\n\nimpl RetryCache {\n    /// Create a new retry cache with the specified default TTL.\n    pub fn new(default_ttl: Duration) -> Self {\n        Self {\n            entries: Arc::new(RwLock::new(HashMap::new())),\n            default_ttl,\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// Generate cache key from request components.\n    ///\n    /// Key format: sha256(batch || target_node || idempotency_key_or_mtask)\n    pub fn cache_key(\n        batch: &[u8],\n        target_node: &str,\n        idempotency_key: Option<&str>,\n    ) -> String {\n        let mut hasher = Sha256::new();\n\n        // Include batch\n        hasher.update(batch);\n\n        // Include target node\n        hasher.update(target_node.as_bytes());\n\n        // Include idempotency key or use empty string\n        if let Some(key) = idempotency_key {\n            hasher.update(key.as_bytes());\n        }\n\n        let result = hasher.finalize();\n        hex::encode(result)\n    }\n\n    /// Get a cached response if it exists and is still valid.\n    pub async fn get(&self, key: &str) -> Option<CachedResponse> {\n        let cache = self.entries.read().await;\n        cache.get(key).and_then(|entry| {\n            if entry.is_valid(self.default_ttl) {\n                Some(entry.clone())\n            } else {\n                None\n            }\n        })\n    }\n\n    /// Store a response in the cache.\n    pub async fn put(&self, key: String, response: CachedResponse) {\n        let mut cache = self.entries.write().await;\n        cache.insert(key, response);\n    }\n\n    /// Remove expired entries from the cache.\n    pub async fn prune(&self) {\n        let mut cache = self.entries.write().await;\n        let now = Instant::now();\n\n        cache.retain(|_, entry| {\n            now.duration_since(entry.cached_at) < self.default_ttl\n        });\n    }\n\n    /// Clear all entries from the cache.\n    pub async fn clear(&self) {\n        let mut cache = self.entries.write().await;\n        cache.clear();\n    }\n\n    /// Get the number of entries in the cache.\n    pub async fn len(&self) -> usize {\n        let cache = self.entries.read().await;\n        cache.len()\n    }\n\n    /// Check if the cache is empty.\n    pub async fn is_empty(&self) -> bool {\n        let cache = self.entries.read().await;\n        cache.is_empty()\n    }\n}\n\n#[cfg(test)]\nmod tests {\n    use super::*;\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_cache_key_generation() {\n        let batch = b\"test_batch\";\n        let target_node = \"node1\";\n        let idempotency_key = Some(\"key123\");\n\n        let key1 = RetryCache::cache_key(batch, target_node, idempotency_key);\n        let key2 = RetryCache::cache_key(batch, target_node, idempotency_key);\n\n        // Same inputs should produce same key\n        assert_eq!(key1, key2);\n\n        // Different inputs should produce different keys\n        let key3 = RetryCache::cache_key(batch, \"node2\", idempotency_key);\n        assert_ne!(key1, key3);\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_cache_key_without_idempotency() {\n        let batch = b\"test_batch\";\n        let target_node = \"node1\";\n\n        let key1 = RetryCache::cache_key(batch, target_node, None);\n        let key2 = RetryCache::cache_key(batch, target_node, None);\n\n        // Same inputs should produce same key\n        assert_eq!(key1, key2);\n\n        // With and without idempotency key should be different\n        let key3 = RetryCache::cache_key(batch, target_node, Some(\"key123\"));\n        assert_ne!(key1, key3);\n    }\n\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn test_cache_put_get() {\n        let cache = RetryCache::new(Duration::from_secs(60));\n\n        let response = CachedResponse {\n            body: b\"test_response\".to_vec(),\n            status: 200,\n            cached_at: Instant::now(),\n        };\n\n        let key = \"test_key\".to_string();\n        cache.put(key.clone(), response.clone()).await;\n\n        let retrieved = cache.get(&key).await;\n        assert!(retrieved.is_some());\n        let retrieved = retrieved.unwrap();\n        assert_eq!(retrieved.body, b\"test_response\");\n        assert_eq!(retrieved.status, 200);\n    }\n\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn test_cache_expiration() {\n        let cache = RetryCache::new(Duration::from_millis(100));\n\n        let response = CachedResponse {\n            body: b\"test_response\".to_vec(),\n            status: 200,\n            cached_at: Instant::now(),\n        };\n\n        let key = \"test_key\".to_string();\n        cache.put(key.clone(), response).await;\n\n        // Should be valid immediately\n        let retrieved = cache.get(&key).await;\n        assert!(retrieved.is_some());\n\n        // Wait for expiration\n        tokio::time::sleep(Duration::from_millis(150)).await;\n\n        // Should be expired now\n        let retrieved = cache.get(&key).await;\n        assert!(retrieved.is_none());\n    }\n\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn test_cache_prune() {\n        let cache = RetryCache::new(Duration::from_millis(100));\n\n        let response1 = CachedResponse {\n            body: b\"test_response1\".to_vec(),\n            status: 200,\n            cached_at: Instant::now(),\n        };\n\n        let response2 = CachedResponse {\n            body: b\"test_response2\".to_vec(),\n            status: 200,\n            cached_at: Instant::now(),\n        };\n\n        cache.put(\"key1\".to_string(), response1).await;\n        cache.put(\"key2\".to_string(), response2).await;\n\n        assert_eq!(cache.len().await, 2);\n\n        // Wait for expiration\n        tokio::time::sleep(Duration::from_millis(150)).await;\n\n        cache.prune().await;\n\n        // Should be empty after pruning\n        assert_eq!(cache.len().await, 0);\n    }\n\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn test_cache_clear() {\n        let cache = RetryCache::new(Duration::from_secs(60));\n\n        let response = CachedResponse {\n            body: b\"test_response\".to_vec(),\n            status: 200,\n            cached_at: Instant::now(),\n        };\n\n        cache.put(\"key1\".to_string(), response.clone()).await;\n        cache.put(\"key2\".to_string(), response).await;\n\n        assert_eq!(cache.len().await, 2);\n\n        cache.clear().await;\n\n        assert_eq!(cache.len().await, 0);\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_cached_response_is_valid() {\n        let response = CachedResponse {\n            body: vec![],\n
